query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `venues` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `slug` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `location` varchar(255), `description` text, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `venues_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `venues_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`))
